title: Saro´s Easy Farming
description: Right-click plants that are fully grown to harvest and replant them
body:
![https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Easy_Farming/MP_SarosEasyFarming_header.webp](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Easy_Farming/MP_SarosEasyFarming_header.webp)

![over](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Easy_Farming/MP_SarosEasyFarming_overview.webp)

Saro's Easy Farming brings a range of convenient features and functions to make farming in Minecraft easier and more efficient. Harvest with ease and enjoy an enhanced farming experience!


![features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Easy_Farming/MP_SarosEasyFarming_features.webp)

- **Automatic Harvesting** 🌾
  - **Crops** (Wheat, Carrots, Potatoes, Beetroots) are automatically harvested and replanted when fully mature.
  - **Sugar Cane** can only be harvested by Shift + Right-Clicking, which collects the entire column at once.
  - **Bamboo** is harvested in a column when using an axe.
  - **Cocoa Beans** are only harvested when fully matured.

- **Easy Replanting** 🌱
  - Harvested crops are immediately replanted to keep the farming cycle going smoothly.

- **Multiplayer and Survival Compatibility** 🌐
  - Perfect for both multiplayer and survival environments.

- **Commands and Configuration** ⚙️
  - No additional commands required; everything works automatically when interacting with the blocks.

![versions](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Easy_Farming/MP_SarosEasyFarming_supported.webp)

### Currently Supported
- **Forge 1.16.5** ✅


![join](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Easy_Farming/MP_SarosEasyFarming_join.webp)

Connect with us on [Discord](https://discord.gg/H8a8CJe) and be part of the Saro's Mod community!
